mechanics.name: Fatal Blow
mechanics.description: A high-damage cinematic attack available only when below 30% health. Can only hit once per match.

mechanics.name: Krushing Blow
mechanics.description: A special cinematic modifier that triggers when certain attacks meet specific conditions (like hitting as a counter or max range). Usually increases damage or launches.

mechanics.name: Breakaway
mechanics.description: Escape a juggle combo by dropping to the ground quickly with armor. Costs 2 bars of Defensive Meter.

mechanics.name: Flawless Block
mechanics.description: Just-defend an attack to mitigate chip damage and unlock the ability to perform special Flawless Block Reversal attacks (Up+2 or Up+3).

mechanics.name: Wakeup Attacks
mechanics.description: Perform an invincible get-up attack (Up+3) or an armored get-up launcher (Up+2) after being knocked down. Costs Offensive and Defensive Meter.
